rationale: Ground truth has no substantive concerns to recall, so both trivially satisfy recall by correctly finding no blockers. Both independently converge on the same legitimate nit (the ==10 gate excluding hypothetical sm_110a from the PR's own tcgen05 target list), grounded and actionable with file:line. X adds one more specific, plausible nit (stale 'Blackwell-only' comment in pyproject.toml:102) giving slightly broader coverage, while Y is marginally tighter/more rigorous in its verification narrative and its APPROVE verdict better matches the actual merged/approved outcome than X's COMMENT verdict.
